parcel_run.name: Parcel Run
parcel_run.brief: An Oceania parcel, unmarked, body-warm. Vex slides it across the table. "Docks to the Citadel drop-box. Sealed means sealed, sweetheart."

choices.result: The drop-box swallows the parcel. Somewhere, Oceania smiles. Vex wires your cut before you're off the plaza.

choices.text: Peek inside, sell what's worth selling to a Eurasia rep.
choices.result: Optics. Prototype, still warm. The Eurasia rep pays double and doesn't blink. Citadel security starts asking around the docks by nightfall.

signal_scrub.name: Signal Scrub
signal_scrub.brief: "Kid in the Shallows got flagged by Eastasia collections — inherited debt, dead mother's lace. Scrub the record." Vex's face says do it clean.

choices.text: Wipe the record, leave no trace.
choices.result: The flag dissolves. The kid will never know it existed, which is the point. Zix hears about the handiwork and approves loudly.

choices.text: Wipe it — and skim the dormant accounts on the way out.
choices.result: The record dies and three dead people's balances follow you home. Clean money, technically. Sora would not call it that.

chaperone.name: Chaperone
chaperone.brief: "Scared kid needs walking through the Shallows after dark. Family paid standard." Vex shrugs like it's nothing. Her eyes don't.

choices.text: Walk them safe, charge as agreed.
choices.result: The kid talks the whole way — about music, mostly. They get home fine. Miko was playing the corner venue and saw the whole thing.

choices.text: Walk them safe — then bill the family double for 'hazards'.
choices.result: The family pays without meeting your eyes. The kid waves goodbye anyway, which is somehow worse. Word travels.

quiet_pickup.name: Quiet Pickup
quiet_pickup.brief: "Eurasia crate, 'misplaced' at the docks, and they'd like it back before the audit. No badges, no noise."

choices.text: Return it to Eurasia, quiet as asked.
choices.result: The crate goes home. The dock manifest never knew it left. Vex calls you 'professional', which from her is poetry.

choices.text: Sell it to Eastasia instead — this week they're at war anyway.
choices.result: Eastasia pays in crisp anonymous chits and a smile with too much serenity in it. Somewhere in the Citadel, a liability report grows your description.
